rule_metadata.name: php_in_image
rule_metadata.author: Vlad https://github.com/vlad-s
rule_metadata.description: Finds image files w/ PHP code in images

rules.rule_text:
rule php_in_image
{
	meta:
		author = "Vlad https://github.com/vlad-s"
		date = "2016/07/18"
		description = "Finds image files w/ PHP code in images"

	strings:
		$gif = /^GIF8[79]a/
		$jfif = { ff d8 ff e? 00 10 4a 46 49 46 }
		$png = { 89 50 4e 47 0d 0a 1a 0a }
		$php_tag = "<?php"

	condition:
		(( $gif at 0 ) or ( $jfif at 0 ) or ( $png at 0 ) ) and $php_tag
}
